channel.title: Hardware Selection on Mi&Bee Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hardware Selection on Mi&Bee Blog

item.title: Embedded Camera Module Selection Handbook — From Basics to Purchasing Reference
item.description:
About This Handbook

This handbook covers 20 mainstream embedded camera modules — 8 OV/GC series (OV2640, OV5640, OV7725, GC0309, OV7670, OV3660, GC2053, GC4653) and 12 Sony IMX/OV MIPI series (IMX219, IMX273, IMX296, IMX307, IMX335, IMX415, IMX477, IMX678, IMX708, IMX766, plus OV9281 and OV5647). All parameters are sourced from official datasheets, with sources noted at the end of each section.

Quick Selection Guide

Start with this table to find your use case, then read the details below.
